log.hide_manyDeaths_food: The villagers huddle in their huts as the wolves prowl outside. Several villagers are dragged from their huts, their screams echoing through the night. The wolves ransack your supplies before vanishing at dawn.

wolfAttack.message: Close to midnight, wolves emerge from the darkness, their eyes glowing with unnatural hunger. Their howls echo filled with malice as they circle the village.
wolfAttack.title: Wolf Attack

log.denyLastUneasy: Something about his demeanor makes you uneasy. You refuse the deal. The woodcutter's smile fades, and he leaves without a word.
log.denyLevel1: You decline his offer. The woodcutter shrugs and walks away into the forest.
log.denyLevel2: You decline his offer. The woodcutter nods and departs without complaint.
log.denyLevel3: You turn down his offer. He shrugs and walks back into the woods.
log.denyLevel4: You decline his ambitious offer. The woodcutter looks disappointed but accepts your decision.
log.denyLevel5: You refuse the deal. The woodcutter frowns but doesn't argue.
log.denyLevel6: You refuse the deal. The woodcutter frowns but doesn't argue.
log.timeoutLast: Your indecision frustrates the woodcutter. He shakes his head and walks away into the forest.
log.timeoutLevel1: Your indecision frustrates the woodcutter. He shrugs and walks away into the forest.
log.timeoutLevel2: Your indecision frustrates the woodcutter. He nods and departs without complaint.
log.timeoutLevel3: Your indecision frustrates the woodcutter. He shrugs and walks back into the woods.
log.timeoutLevel4: Your indecision frustrates the woodcutter. He looks disappointed but accepts and leaves.
log.timeoutLevel5: Your indecision frustrates the woodcutter. He frowns and walks away.
log.timeoutLevel6: Your indecision frustrates the woodcutter. He frowns and walks away.

log.outcome0: Upon inspection, you see nothing unusual in the well. It must have been a trick of the light or your imagination. The unease lingers, but you feel slightly better.
log.outcome1: You lean over the well's edge. Your reflection grins back with too many teeth and whispers secrets about what was once built where the village stands now. You pull back, but the knowledge remains, burning in your mind.
log.outcome2: You board up the well with wooden planks, forbidding all access to the unholy water. Building a new well takes too long to finish, and ${thirstDeaths} of the villagers perish of thirst.

wrongReflections.message: The surface of the village well shows reflections that don't match reality. You see yourself, but older, with hollow eyes and a mouth full of darkness.
wrongReflections.title: Wrong Reflections

wrongVillagers.message: You count the villagers and there are three more than there should be. The extra ones look exactly like villagers who died months ago. They work, eat, and sleep normally, but their eyes hold depths of ancient malice.

log.outcome0: You banish the young woman from the village. She convinces ${actualLeavers} sympathetic villagers to leave with her, abandoning your settlement forever.
log.outcome1: Shortly after the sacrifice is carried out at the Black Monolith, ${actualLeavers} horrified villagers pack their belongings and leave in disgust.
log.outcome2: You agree to end the practice of human sacrifice. The woman proposes destroying the Black Monolith and building a pure white obelisk in its place cleansing the darkness from the people's minds.

youngWomanProtest.message: A young woman approaches you with tears streaming down her face. 'Both my parents were sacrificed to that cursed monolith,' she cries. 'This barbaric behavior has to stop!'
youngWomanProtest.title: The Young Woman's Plea

message.original: A knock comes from the estate door. A figure completely hulled in dark robes stands in the shadows outside. It whispers: 'Voiceless it cries, wingless flutters, toothless bites, mouthless mutters.'
message.variant: A knock comes from the estate door. A figure completely hulled in dark robes stands in the shadows outside. It whispers: 'A lady's desire, grown in darkness, shining with pale light.'

log.wrong: The figure shakes its head before vanishing. The next day, a dense fog creeps into the village. Villagers claim to see shifting shapes within it, many are too fearful to leave their huts.
log.success_first: The figure nods its head slightly before fading into the darkness. By morning, a small bag of gold rests upon the estate's doorstep.

message.original: A knock comes from the estate door. A figure completely hulled in dark robes stands in the shadows outside. It whispers: 'Voiceless it cries, wingless flutters, toothless bites, mouthless mutters.'

message.original: The cloaked figure returns to the estate under the pale moonlight. Its voice echoes: 'Goes on four feet in the morning, two feet at noon, and three feet in the evening.'
message.variant: The cloaked figure returns to the estate under the pale moonlight. Its voice echoes: 'Can't hurt you, but leaves you with scars.'

log.wrong: The figure shakes its head before vanishing. The next day, a dense fog creeps into the village. Villagers claim to see shifting shapes within it, many are too fearful to leave their huts.
log.success_second: The figure gives a faint nod and vanishes into the night. At dawn, a weathered leather pouch of gold lies where it stood.

message.original: Once again, the mysterious figure appears at the estate. It whispers with a low voice: 'All things it devours, turns bones to dust, slays kings, wears mountains down, erases towns.'
message.variant: Once again, the mysterious figure appears at the estate. It whispers with a low voice: 'Has fingers yet no flesh, no feathers, no scales, no bone.'

log.wrong: The figure shakes its head before vanishing. The next day, a dense fog creeps into the village. Villagers claim to see shifting shapes within it, many are too fearful to leave their huts.
log.success_third: The figure tilts its head in quiet acknowledgment before stepping back into the dim. When morning comes, a worn coin purse of gold is found outside the door.

message.original: The hulled figure appears once more at the estate. It whispers: 'Flies without wings, cries without eyes, darkness follows wherever it goes.'
message.variant: The hulled figure appears once more at the estate. It whispers: 'Soft, delicate, silky, but if you're wrapped in me, you scream.'

log.wrong: The figure shakes its head before vanishing. The next day, a dense fog creeps into the village. Villagers claim to see shifting shapes within it, many are too fearful to leave their huts.
log.success_fourth: The figure lowers its hooded head for a moment before dissolving into the shadows. A small sack of gold remains behind on the cold ground.

message.original: The nightly figure appears one more time at the estate. Its voice silently echoes through the night: 'Your eyes are open, I am there, your eyes are closed, I am there too.'
message.variant: The nightly figure appears one more time at the estate. Its voice silently echoes through the night: 'Poor have me, rich need me. Eat me, you die.'

log.wrong: The figure shakes its head before vanishing. The next day, a dense fog creeps into the village. Villagers claim to see shifting shapes within it, many are too fearful to leave their huts.
log.success_fifth: The figure bows its head in silent reverence before fading completely. A big sack of gold lays on the ground where it stood.
